title: sleet fleet config
description: The fleet config: `sleet.toml` at the fleet root.

database.description:
Service settings applied to every database; a `dbs/<db>.toml`
file overrides them per field.

CoordinatorOverrides.description:
Compaction coordinator settings (SlateDB `CompactorOptions`; sleet
always runs the coordinator without an embedded worker).

commit_compacted_interval.description: How often `Compacted` results are committed to the manifest.

manifest_update_timeout.description: How long manifest updates are retried before giving up.

poll_interval.description: How often the coordinator polls the manifest to schedule compactions.

worker_heartbeat_timeout.description: Reclaim a `Running` job whose worker heartbeat is older than this.

CopierKind.description: Who moves a mirror target's data objects.

oneOf.description: sleet streams objects between the two stores itself.

sleet computes the object list per pass and drives
`rclone copy --files-from`.

Bucket replication configured outside sleet ships the data
directories; sleet backfills misses and commits manifests.

DatabaseConfig.title: sleet database config
DatabaseConfig.description:
Per-database service settings: the `[database]` table of `sleet.toml`
and, verbatim, the contents of a `dbs/<db>.toml` registry file. All
fields are optional; unset fields fall through to the next precedence
layer.

services.description:
Which services run for the database. Default: all of them. An
explicit empty list registers the database but runs nothing.

GcDetachOverrides.description: Settings for the clone-detach GC pass (no file-age threshold).

enabled.description: Set false to disable the detach pass.

interval.description: How often the detach pass runs.

GcDirectoryOverrides.description: GC settings for one resource directory.

enabled.description: Set false to disable GC for this directory.

interval.description: How often the GC pass runs.

GcOverrides.description: Garbage collection settings, per SlateDB resource directory.

detach.description: Detaching clones whose parent references are no longer needed.

wal_fence.description:
Zero-byte WAL fence objects. Deleting fences too young can lose
writes; dry-run by default.

HumanDuration.description: A duration in humantime form, e.g. "10s", "5m", "1h 30m".

MirrorMode.description: How a mirror target is kept in sync.

oneOf.description:
The sync pass plus the WAL tail, on a `poll` cadence with idle
backoff.

One pass every `interval`; each committed manifest is a
point-in-time cut.

MirrorOverrides.description:
Mirror settings: the `[database.mirror]` table (fleet-wide) or the
`[mirror]` table of a `dbs/<db>.toml`.

targets.description:
Named mirror targets. Layers merge per target name, then per
field: a `dbs/<db>.toml` entry overrides the fleet-wide target
of the same name field by field, except that `url` and
`source_prefix` travel together (a layer that sets either
overrides both).

MirrorTargetOverrides.description:
One named mirror target. All fields are optional; unset fields fall
through to the previous layer, then to built-in defaults.

checkpoint_lifetime.description:
Lifetime of the source pin checkpoint a pass holds while
copying; refreshed at half-life while the pass runs.

copier.description: Who moves data objects; sleet always commits manifests.

copy_parallelism.description: Builtin copier: concurrent object copies per pass.

disabled.description:
Opt out of an inherited target. An ordinary overridable field,
because per-field fall-through cannot unset a target.

interval.description: Periodic mode: the cadence between passes.

min_age.description: Prune deletion age floor for data objects at the target.

mode.description: How the target is kept in sync.

poll.description: Continuous mode: the pass and WAL tail cadence.

source_prefix.description:
Scope the target to databases under this URL prefix (matched at
path-segment boundaries) and map each one to `url` plus its
path with the prefix stripped. For precedence this field and
`url` travel together: a layer that sets either overrides both.

url.description:
The destination root. On its own an exact destination for one
database; with `source_prefix`, the base the stripped database
path is appended to.

NodeConfig.description:
Settings every node follows. These are fleet-wide agreements: nodes
must judge liveness with the same timeout for placement to converge.

config_poll.description: How often nodes re-read `sleet.toml` and LIST `dbs/`.

heartbeat_interval.description: How often each node writes its heartbeat object.

heartbeat_timeout.description: Nodes whose heartbeat is older than this are treated as dead.

RetentionOverrides.description: Restore-point retention for one mirror target.

keep.description:
Keep every restore point younger than this, plus the manifests
their live checkpoints pin.

include_size_threshold.description:
A sorted run joins a compaction if its size is below this multiple
of the smallest run already included.

max_compaction_sources.description: Maximum sources included together in one compaction.

min_compaction_sources.description: Minimum sources included together in one compaction.

bytes_to_fetch.description: Read-ahead request size in bytes while iterating input SSTs.

compactions_poll_interval.description:
How often workers poll `.compactions` for `Scheduled` jobs; sleet
backs the interval off exponentially while the database is idle.

compression_codec.description:
Compression for SSTs the worker writes. Must match the writer's
`compression_codec`.

count.description:
Worker nodes for this database: the top `count` nodes of the
database's rendezvous ranking poll its compaction queue.

heartbeat_bytes.description: Bytes a worker must process before emitting a heartbeat.

heartbeat_min_interval.description: Minimum wall-clock time between heartbeat writes.

max_concurrent_compactions.description: Jobs a single worker may hold simultaneously.

max_fetch_tasks.description: Concurrent block-fetch tasks per input SST.

max_sst_size.description: Maximum output SST size in bytes before a new one is rolled.

max_subcompactions.description:
Maximum subcompactions per job (RFC-0028); values <= 1 disable
subcompactions.

min_filter_keys.description:
Write bloom filters for SSTs with at least this many keys. Must
match the writer's `min_filter_keys`.
